statement: In every magma, Equation 3111 (`x = (((y * x) * x) * z) * w`) implies Equation 927 (`x = y * ((y * z) * (x * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0715
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) x) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y z) (op x y)))
